headCommit: the marathon commits containing this report
goal: let the user persist misc:disable_autoreload = true through the gated scalar Save so Safe Live Save Mode survives restarts
writePath: production_save::gated_scalar_save_live only (backup first, one write, reread verification, no reload); the module never touches files and can express no other setting or value (both are constants; no public function accepts a setting id or value)
gateOrdering: runtime Safe Live Save Mode verified live BEFORE the write (fails closed on inactive/unreadable), then the gated scalar Save re-verifies the same gate internally
persistedStateProjection: read_persisted_safe_live_save_mode reads the current-config snapshot (the flat misc:disable_autoreload syntax the gated Save writes): PersistedTrue / PersistedOther / NotPersisted / Unknown
ui: Safe Live Save Mode card now shows runtime status AND persisted-in-config status, with Enable for this session / Disable for this session / Save as default; Save as default is enabled only while the runtime mode is active and not already persisted, and explains that it writes misc:disable_autoreload = true through the normal gated Save
liveFlowProof: tests/persist_safe_live_save_mode_live.rs passed 2026-07-13: persist blocked while the runtime mode was inactive (gate proof); after enabling, persisted once with byte-exact backup and reread-verified 'true'; projection flipped to PersistedTrue; flow-proof cleanup restored pre-test bytes byte-exactly and the original runtime state
liveTestWriteDiscipline: env-gated + ignored; write once through the gated Save; flow-proof cleanup restored pre-test bytes byte-exactly and the original runtime autoreload state
runtimeMutationScope: misc:disable_autoreload toggled through the proven fixed-constant transitions and restored to its original state

tests/persist_safe_live_save_mode_live.rs (1 env-gated live flow proof, passed 2026-07-13)

no public function accepts a setting id or value
the gate call persist_safe_live_save_mode_gate(&mut runner)? precedes the save
